programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Villagers are being enslaved to dig out three ancient warriors whom the Cloud of Monstrox wants to bring back to life. Can the NEXO KNIGHTS make their COMBO NEXO Powers work inside a mountain?

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: At K.O.M.A. (Knightonia Official Museum of Art) Monstrox learns that a Forbidden Power tablet is hidden.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: The old Lava Monsters are back! And a Forbidden Power is in the middle of their new village of Burningham.

programme.title: LEGO Nexo Knights
programme.desc: Macy is mad! The three Harpies have kidnapped her mom, Queen Halbert. The NEXO KNIGHTS use everything in their power to rescue her.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have learned a coup d'état is about to take place in one of the Caribbean countries. Amidst the chaos, they plan to steal the dictator's treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Count Bone and Lord Wave operate the Rondo Insurance Company. The two seem like perfect English gentlemen, but they make their money through dirty tactics.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Queen Gretchen of the Kingdom of Monaka dies from a car accident. As a fan of her years as a Hollywood actress, Lupin mourns her passing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Once a year, jewelers from around the country descend on New York City for a jewelry tradeshow, bringing with them their entire inventory. Combined, the jewelry is said to be worth 20 million dollars.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have Pinkerton's unbreakable safe, minus the key. Lupin breaks into the prison where the late Pinkerton was once held and finds the key hidden in his former prison cell. Now the gang has both the safe and key.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: At Fujiko's request, Lupin steals the Hina dolls given to the US Vice President by the Deputy Prime Minister of Japan. However, the doll heist was a trap laid out by Fujiko and her partner, Barracuda.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Goemon pities the young boy who is afflicted with an incurable illness and swears to retrieve his father's painting for him. Will Goemon be able to keep his promise and will Lupin decipher the painting's hidden secret?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: The 100-carat blue diamond, known as Hades' Tear is auctioned off at 1 billion dollars along with its accompanying Hades statue to the KL Foundation of Kingsland. Lupin and Jigen make off with Hades' Tear with ease, but they find out it's only glass.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Mexico's richest woman, Madame Tequila owns a black diamond named the Black Pig of Mexico. Realizing that Lupin is after her diamond, Madame Tequila appoints Inspector Zenigata to guard it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 3
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal the Ivanov, the Soviet Union's newest atomic submarine from the Port of Arkhangelsk. Lupin becomes entangled in a fierce tug of war between the KGB and CIA when Fujiko decides to sell it to the highest bidder.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #9 Islands of Assasins
programme.desc: The den of the deadly Tarantulas gang, this island is the most dangerous place on Earth… and Lupin's right in the middle of it! A dark mystery haunts his past, and the key to it is on the island.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #10 Tokyo Crisis
programme.desc: When Lupin and his bandit buddies attempt to steal a set of historically significant photographic plates, it turns out they're not the only ones with eyes on the prize in this thievish tale of mayhem and millionaires.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Fenway Park 100 Years
programme.desc: Fenway Park first opened on April 20, 1912 and since then has been known for its unique features and historic moments. Current and former Red Sox players share their experiences playing in one of baseball's greatest ballparks.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/15/70: After allowing three runs in the 1st inning, Mike Cuellar silenced the Reds over the next eight frames to pitch a complete game. The Orioles offense backed his start, scoring nine runs on 15 hits to take Game 5 and win the 1970 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/75: Tony Pérez started the Reds' comeback in Game 7, smashing a two-run home run over the Green Monster and onto Lansdowne Street. Jim Burtan scored Ken Griffey in the top of the 9th to break a 3-3 tie and give the Reds their third World Series win.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/18/77: With one game away from a World Series win, "Mr. October" Reggie Jackson knocks three homers against three different Dodgers pitchers and Mike Torrez pitches a complete game. The Yankees win 8-4 and take home a championship.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/1977 - Paul Blair singles home Willie Randolph in the bottom of the 12th inning to give the Yankees a walk-off victory against the Dodgers in Game 1 of the 1977 World Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Throughout his career, throwing a no-hitter was one accolade that had eluded Hall of Famer Tom Seaver. There were many close calls and one-hitters, but finally on June 16, 1978, Tom Terrific made history with the Reds and kept the Cardinals hitless.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers returns a scarf to one of Mr. Brewer's puppets which makes the puppet feel brave and strong. Elsie Jean Platypus tells Lady Abelrin that the cereal quit falling on her because she was not afraid of it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the McFeelys, who are watching after young lambs. Handyman Negri and King Friday put on full cereal-proof armor. When their efforts fail, it is clear that Daniel is the only one who can stop the cereal from falling.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use tuning whistles. Daniel has the idea to give the cereal to people who might need food. Neighbor Aber brings a forklift to gather all the boxes. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make it.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers remembers a time when he visited Jay Styperk, a para-Olympic swimmer. King Friday's crown has gone missing. He hesitantly enters the castle garden, wearing his swimming cap and goggles.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers uses objects from his kitchen to make a horse sculpture. Prince Tuesday is dressed in a lion costume and startles Mayor Maggie. He explains that wearing the costume helps him feel brave about looking for his father's crown.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mr. McFeely delivers a video about how people make apple juice. King Friday suggests that Lady Aberlin start looking for his missing crown at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a fish sculpted from the paper by his friend Ben Gonzales. Edgar Cooke shares with Lady Aberlin that his refrigerator and food are gone. She finds it, along with King Friday's crown and the Westwood sign.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Bill Nye, “the Science Guy” stops by to show a science experiment using baking soda and vinegar to blow up a balloon. Mister Rogers shows a video of dump trucks at a construction site, and in Make-Believe, all that was lost is found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Magician David Copperfield teaches Mister Rogers how to do a magic trick. It takes lots of practice. In Make-Believe, X is giving flying lessons, and there's a video of what the world looks like from a bird's point of view.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Prince Tuesday is upset about being unable to fly, so Lady Elaine gives him a propeller hat. He jumps off the castle wall, thinking the hat will make him fly, and injures his arm. Mister Rogers visits the Uptown String Quartet.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: X says he is feeling guilty about Prince Tuesday's fall. Neighbor Aber says it was not X's flying lessons that made Prince Tuesday get hurt. Mister Rogers shows a video about people making sleeping bags. He visits the workshop of the doll maker.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Instead of changing into a sweater as he typically does, Mister Rogers puts on a vest made by his friend Saihou Njie. Trolley brings a batik cloth to Handyman Negri, who then gives it to King Friday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a children's plastic potty, takes it to his bathroom and compares it to the adult-sized toilet. Prince Tuesday comes up with a game using a bucket but has had his feelings hurt when his father was not impressed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday denounces the magic finder balloon. Neighbors Aber and Robert Troll are looking for Lady Elaine. They find her locked in a room of the Museum-Go-Round. At Mister Rogers' house, Levar Burton reads “The Daddy Book.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about a service dog aiding a handicapped child. Mister Rogers visits with the boy from the video and his dog. Lady Elaine Fairchile continues her efforts to catch the gorilla. Neighbor Aber is missing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reads a book about a dog named Zak. There's also a video visit to the Center for Creative Play, a place where children of all abilities can play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely ride with Maria Mancano on a helicopter. Miss Paulificate and Lady Aberlin have been assigned the duty of “yo-yo guard,” responsible for upholding the King's ban on yo-yos.

programme.desc: Mr. McFeely shows a photo album with pictures of Neighbors wearing different hats. Lady Aberlin informs King Friday that Lady Elaine's helicopter, Yo-Yo, is stuck in the air. King Friday commands that all references to yo-yos be removed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Shandorians prepare for an all-out attack on their priestly adversaries, Chopper meets the mysterious creatures that saved his life, and Nami makes an astonishing discovery about the origins of Upper Yard.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Shandorians continue their battle for control of Upper Yard, the Straw Hats celebrate their happy reunion by swapping stories over a campfire and feasting on barbequed Skyshark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Laki’s pursuit of precious Vearth causes one of her Shandorian comrades to be injured during the battle with Ohm. As night falls on Upper Yard, the Straw Hats dream of gold while dancing with wolves!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The electrifying deity of Skypiea, God Eneru, grants his priests unlimited power in their hunt for the Straw Hats. Usopp has a plan to get the mysteriously-repaired Going Merry back in the water, but it involves using Chopper as bait!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats scatter when their search for gold uncovers a giant python, and Gan Fall reveals the tragic story of Jaya’s arrival in the sky. Meanwhile, Wyper readies the Shandorians for a raid on Eneru’s shrine!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the heartless god of Upper Yard eagerly anticipates the dawning of Sky Warefare, the Shandorian forces are savagely snared by the Ordeal of String, and Luffy wanders into the fight of his life!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro rushes to perfect a deadly technique known as the Flying Blade Attack. The move proves difficult to master, but it could be the key to the swordsman surviving a battle with the Shandorian warrior, Braham.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Usopp are driven to their knees by the electrifying presence of god, Luffy is nearly incinerated by Wyper’s Burn Bazooka, and Nami joins Gan Fall in a fight against two killer clones!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper unleashes the fury of his Rumble Ball during a sticky slugfest with a swap cloud spewing priest of Upper Yard. Can the little reindeer discover his opponent’s lone weakness before it’s too late?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami and the Knight of the Sky team up to obliterate two bumbling, balloon-shaped bad guys, and God Eneru relies on his astounding invincibility to torment a noble Shandorian warrior.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin’s search for a mystical city of gold is interrupted by Yama, one of Eneru’s faithful servants. When the rampaging warrior destroys some ancient ruins, he provokes the wrath of Robin’s many fists of fury!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Priest Ohm silences Chopper with an attack from which few – if any – ever recover. Meanwhile, Luffy begins to notice something strange about his cave-like prison, and four fearsome warriors prepare for battle!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Gan Fall, Wyper, Ohm, and a prizefighting pooch gather for a ferocious free-for-all at the site of the Upper Ruins. While the battle rages, Luffy tries to punch his way out of the belly of a poisonous python!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Wyper are out to beat down the same bad guys, but will they realize it soon enough to survive a white-barbed death match of doom? Deep in the belly of the python, Nami and Luffy enjoy what could be a short-lived reunion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Eager to end their battle, Zoro aims the awesome destructive power of his 108 Caliber Phoenix at the sinister Priest Ohm! Elsewhere, god demands that Robin help him search for a legendary golden bell.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru begins a deadly rampage aimed at exterminating the heavenly beings of Skypiea, and the ruins of Shandora become the scene of a bloody contest where survival is the name of the game.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gan Fall, Wyper, Zoro, and Robin join forces for an attack on God Eneru. Despite their furious onslaught, the four warriors prove powerless to harm the thunderous deity until Wyper utilizes the power of a mystical stone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: God Eneru makes a shocking recovery from wounds that should have ended his reign of terror. Zoro and Wyper muster the strength for one final stand, and Nami must choose between her friends – and survival.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy emerges from his serpentine tomb with one thing on his mind: revenge! As the rubber-man sets out to settle the score with God Eneru, Conis rushes to warn her people of their impending doom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the citizens of the sky run for their lives, Eneru issues in the dawn of Deathpiea! Luffy is determined to stop the madman, but first he must discover a way to lay hands on the heinous holy man!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A handful of gold sends Luffy hurtling towards his death, Sanji and Usopp mount a midair rescue mission, and Nami prepares for an electrifying showdown with God Eneru!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp arrives just in time to save Nami from a lethal thunderbolt, but even their combined powers are no match for Eneru. While they scramble for an escape route, Sanji stealthily searches for a way to sabotage god’s ark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite being slowed by an arm encased in gold, Luffy races up a giant beanstalk on a mission to settle the score with Eneru! Elsewhere, the people of Skypiea feel the jolt of god’s wrath!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A flashback offers a glimpse at the lives of two legendary figures in Skypiea’s history: Montblanc Noland and the ferocious warrior Kalgara!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Montblanc Noland and the warrior Kalgara succeed in settling their difference before parting ways, but the laws of nature and man conspire to keep them apart – permanently!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Minnesota police hunt for a killer caller who confesses to a string of murders in a chilling, high-pitched voice, begging for forgiveness; no one can identify him until one woman survives a brutal attack.

programme.desc: Host Henry Louis Gates, Jr. shares the family histories of director Alejandro G. Iñárritu, iconoclastic performance artist Marina Abramović and painter Kehinde Wiley. These visionary artists find their identities challenged—and affirmed.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: Two stories of children separated from their parents. Adopted Laurence Peat is searching for his mother, hoping to lay to rest his sense of being unwanted. The story of Denise Temple, desperate to find her daughter, who she battled to keep.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: Two stories of family secrets are revealed in this episode. Robert Capron searches for his mother, who abandoned him to be brought up by his father. There is also the extraordinary story of twin sisters looking for their younger twin brothers.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: Two stories of lives overshadowed by regret. Ann Munro gave up her son for adoption; ever since, her life has been overshadowed by guilt. And Louise Kendall searches for her father, who she knows didn't want her.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: Two stories of women cheated of family. Given up for adoption at birth, Sara Price-Parker then lost her adoptive mother to cancer. Today she is searching for her birth mother. And the story of Pauline Wood searching for her baby brother.

programme.title: Long Lost Family (UK)
programme.desc: Richard Cue's birth mother was related to his adoptive mom, but ten years on he has been unable to trace her. And the story of Tania Bartlett searching for her Iranian father who she last heard from more than thirty years ago.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.desc: Henry Louis Gates, Jr. delves into the roots of two African-American guests, actor S. Epatha Merkerson and athlete and television personality Michael Strahan. Both discover unexpected stories that challenge assumptions about black history.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots
programme.desc: Host Henry Louis Gates, Jr. explores the diverse family histories of politicians Paul Ryan, Tulsi Gabbard and Marco Rubio. They each see a shared vision of the great American melting pot reflected in their ancestors' stories.

programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get revved up when they check out a classic 1941 Indian motorcycle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars march to a different beat when a customer presents them with a drum from the Civil War.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: The Boondock Saints II: All Saints Day

A naïve young man assumes a dead man’s identity in order to join an underworld game of Russian roulette. Costarring Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham, and Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Redemption
programme.desc: Ex-soldier Joseph Smith comes home from war but has been left disturbed by his experiences. Despite his intentions to start a new life, he becomes caught up in the criminal underworld, where he plots revenge on his friend's killer.

programme.title: The Killer Elite
programme.desc: James Caan and Robert Duvall star in Sam Peckinpah's tense, action-packed thriller that explores savagery and betrayal in the murky world of killers-for-hire.

programme.title: Snake Boss
programme.desc: Johnny rescues a python in the poo, Julia starts a new business venture before facing off against two very deadly snakes.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote discovers a bizarre, alien-looking python millipede! Will Coyote fall victim to its potent toxin?

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote discovers a monster-sized snail! Check out this cool gastropod right outside a basecamp in South Africa!

programme.title: Mountain Lion: The Ghost Cat
programme.desc: The ghost cat is one of the most elusive animals roaming the wilderness.

programme.title: Australia's Deadly Monsters
programme.desc: Ruthless creatures wreaking havoc in Australia's tropical north.

programme.title: Saving Jaws
programme.desc: Biologist OCEAN RAMSEY (“Shark Whisper") credits her connection with sharks to years of research, but others feel it’s something more. Join Ocean and a team of biologists as they travel the globe trying to halt their looming extinction.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Kate Humble and Ben Fogle return to Longleat Safari Park to join the keepers and animals as the park springs into action for another season.

programme.title: Lemur Street
programme.desc: A forest fire prevents the Graveyard gang from returning home, leaving little Hogarth to face the night alone. Titus, the leader of the rovers, returns with his gang of trouble makers and once again Blake is called on to defend the Graveyard girls.

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: On the plains of Amboseli, the rains are over two months late. Echo brings the family to the palms to eat the last leaves.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Every year, hundreds of wildlife attacks and accidents occur in the pristine waters of the paradise, sunshine state of Florida.

programme.title: Great Lakes Wild
programme.desc: Since the 1900's, this uninhabited island in Lake Superior has been a constant battleground between moose and wolves. We follow along lead researcher Rolf Peterson as he gets a band of volunteers to scour the island for moose bones.

programme.title: Life In A Tide Pool
programme.desc: Sea Stars are very fascinating animals that are very strong, have thousands of tube feet, and come in a variety of shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations
programme.desc: Kristina travels back to Zimbabwe's stunning lake Kariba. This time she's touring the area on the luxurious Karabezi Houseboat Cruiser. Joined by fishing experts, Craig and Mark, she attempts to catch the notorious tiger fish.

programme.title: Animal Science
programme.desc: In this episode we meet human’s closest relatives – primates. See what makes a chimpanzee one of the most intelligent primates. Find out why the spider monkey is such an amazing climber and feel the power of the howler monkey’s howl.

programme.title: Ultimate Oceans
programme.desc: Beneath the frothing surf and undulating swell, giants, monsters and storybook characters come to life in brilliant colour, playing their role in this immense ecosystem.

programme.title: Waterlife
programme.desc: Scientists have found multiple evidences that point at a climatic change in our planet.

programme.title: Wild Animal Rescue
programme.desc: We follow FOUR PAWS’ efforts to give captive lions a better life. A family of five lions who suffered a harsh life in a Romanian zoo, are given a new home, and a new lease on life; and we take a look at a shocking, yet legal, industry.

programme.title: Giants of Fortune
programme.desc: Things seem bleak for fisherman Zosimo and his family until the world's biggest fish, the whale shark, comes along and changes everything.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Mark and the crew are in Utah near Zion National Park to go canyoneering!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Get ready, you're about to watch the crew enter the kill zone with some great white sharks!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Will the jaws of gators attack the crew underwater or are these reptilian predators simply misunderstood? Get ready to find out!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Mark and Mario take a look back at Coyote’s encounter with the roar of a grizzly bear from a real base camp in Montana!

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A woman is attacked by an elephant during a family trip to Thailand.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Friends are confronted by a grizzly and a woman ends up in a hippo's jaws.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys look back at wild catches from Mississippi's Gulf Coast.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: A mother gator is determined to fight to the death to protect her young.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Torrential rains make the capturing gators extremely hazardous.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls is dropped on an Icelandic ice cap covering an active volcano.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear confronts a raging river and more as he tackles New Zealand.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: African Savannah
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows how to survive on the African Savannah by becoming a lost tourist. Every year 40 US citizens die after being attacked by wild animals.Bear shows how to find water, avoid predators, and find food in this parched and dangerous environment.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Bear's Ultimate Survival Guide Part 1
programme.desc: From falling into the ice of Siberia, to battling sharks to make it off a desert island in Indonesia and skinning and eating snakes in the mangroves of Panama, Bear offers you a guide to survival for the most dangerous of places.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Guatemala
programme.desc: Bear Grylls rappels onto a live volcano in Guatemala, navigates a waterfall in an underground cave, creates a nest to safely sleep in but gets an unwelcome bed buddy, and encounters ancient Mayan ruins.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Urban Survivor
programme.desc: In a special edition of Man vs Wild, Bear Grylls finds himself in a new kind of jungle -- a concrete jungle. Bear uses the same wilderness survival techniques to stay alive in a city post-disaster.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Emotions run high for the remaining participants as they struggle to adapt to the hardships of the island. One participant wrestles with the solitude and contemplates tapping out.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy cope with the uncertainty of Lou's condition by liberating a Vespa from a leather-clad biker and his rabble-rousing girlfriend. Then, Matt and Froy head out again to claim a Toyota Yaris from a truant children's entertainer.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Sonia hit the beach to repossess an old-fashioned classic surfer car from an old-fashioned surfer looking for a classic tussle. Then, Froy and Matt stretch their wits to identify and take down an uncooperative Segway renter.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late-model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy unfurl an elaborate sting when they repo a taxicab by tricking its driver into picking them up. But what to do with his ferociously inebriated client?

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy slip into a gated community for a repossession only to attract the attention of a trio of irate and incompetent security guards. Then, Lou and Sonia come face-to-face with a debtor and her entire adult-league softball team.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy head to a supermarket to repossess a Mitsubishi from a truant bagboy, but they'll also have to contend with a furious shopper. Then, Matt and Froy find their car, but it's been heavily vandalized.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy repossess a car from a cheating husband who's shacked up at a nearby motel. His wife probably isn't going to be too happy to hear about this. Then, Sonia and Lyndah crash a high school reunion to confront an over-the-hill jock.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy head into a nice part of town to repossess a BMW from an entitled yuppie, but first they'll have to contend with his rampaging long-distance girlfriend. Then, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt venture into a trailer park.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia trace an out-of-state skip account to a seedy motel, where they come face-to-face with a hopping-mad cowboy and his female companion. Then, Matt and Sonia go where no repo man has gone before to repossess a Ford.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy storm a studio to repossess a Corvette from a surly European photographer and his hapless, bikini-clad subjects. Then, Lou and Matt stumble into a lover's quarrel - will they be able to reclaim the vehicle from two suited suitors?

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.desc: Danny McBride stars in his breakout comedic performance as Fred Simmons, an outrageous Tae Kwon Do Master who rules his mini-mall dojo with an iron fist.

programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens find themselves battling for laughs while impersonating their favorite celebrities on "RuPaul's Gaff-In" with Vicki Lawrence's "Mama", who is joined on the judge's panel by actress Busy Phillips.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Attila the Hun, the barbarian horseman who terrorized Europe, battles Alexander the Great, history's greatest military tactician.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Alone

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four new bladesmiths have their creativity put to the test when they are tasked with making a serrated blade out of only the tools from the table in front of them. They must harvest enough steel to forge the blade.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must use the steel from a suit of armor to create a signature blade. The two finalists must create a weapon historically used for both combat and hunting--the boar spear.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: When a group of new bladesmiths enters the forge, they're met with a surprising challenge. They must grab the steel they'll use to make their blades from an imposing piece of construction equipment.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must salvage steel from a junkyard to create a signature blade using a hand-cranked coal forge. Then, the two finalists will have just five days to create a Dayak war sword, the Pandat.

programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.desc: Don and his family are in danger when they become the targets of the suspects Don and the team are investigating.

programme.title: Numb3rs

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for Abby Horton, a promising young artist who secretly photographed strangers who were experiencing intense personal moments and then later painted them.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the team search for Jason Turner, a young water plant foreman who disappears hours after his life is threatened by Earl Dooley, a longtime employee who was enraged when Jason laid him off.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and the squad interrogate a suburban tourist, Rob Darcy, who claims someone kidnapped his wife from their hotel room. But nothing Rob says can be verified.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When a high-profile U.S. Senator with a wealthy father goes missing, Jack and the team are forced to do their jobs under intense scrutiny from the media and the government.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a teenage girl who disappeared after trying to dodge the advances of an aggressive boy. Meanwhile, Samantha's estranged sister attempts to reconnect with her.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Samantha secretly searches for her missing sister, Emily, with only the aid of the local police. But when Jack finds out about Emily's abduction, he insists that the team get involved.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for an interracial couple's six-year-old son, who was kidnapped from a farmer's market as his mother briefly looked away to make a purchase.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a stuntman who went missing shortly after completing a dangerous, fiery stunt. They discover that he received a death threat minutes before he vanished from the film set.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: After signing paperwork ordering a violent husband to vacate his home, beleaguered divorce-court judge Chris Manning (LOREN DEAN) disappears.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a teenage girl who vanished during her high school prom. Witnesses reported that the girl left the festivities to rest alone in her hotel room upstairs.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In the fifth season finale, the team searches for a missing 13-year-old girl whose mother fears she fell prey to a fierce neighborhood drug dealer.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In the sixth season premiere, Jack and the squad search for a celebrity couple's Sudanese 2-year-old adopted son, who is kidnapped from his home.

programme.desc: An ex-con and his devoted wife must flee from danger when a heist doesn't go as planned.

programme.desc: An unhappy dentist in Montreal gets a new neighbor, Jimmy 'The Tulip' Teduski, a former mob hitman turned informant with a price on his head.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Mimic 2
programme.desc: Four years after a terrifying mutation took New York City by surprise, a detective stumbles upon a link between the "mimic" creatures and three grisly new murder victims. The shape-shifting bugs are back.

programme.title: Mimic 3: Sentinel
programme.desc: In the third creature feature in the MIMIC franchise, the bugs are back. After a group of people begin to disappear, a man hypersensitive to germs and confined to a protective bubble, decides to play detective.

programme.title: Supernova
programme.desc: "Supernova" chronicles the search and rescue patrol of a deep space medical ship and its six-member crew.

programme.title: DOA: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The world's best fighters are invited to DOA, a martial-arts tournament. Four female rival fighters, an aristocratic warrior, a wrestling superstar, an athlete with a tragic past, and an assassin-for-hire, work together to uncover a secret.

programme.title: Event Horizon
programme.desc: In 2047, a team of astronauts embarks on a mission to retrieve a missing spaceship. However, their simple retrieval job leads to something far more terrifying than any of them would suspect.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Stephen King's Silver Bullet
programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: School Ties
programme.desc: After receiving a scholarship to an exclusive prep school, working-class teen David Greene becomes a star athlete and wins the attention of a beautiful debutante.

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: Jimi: All Is By My Side
programme.desc: A drama based on Jimi Hendrix's life as he left New York City for London, where his career took off.

programme.title: The Master
programme.desc: Haunted by his past, WW-II veteran and drifter Freddie Quell (Joaquin Phoenix) crosses paths with a mysterious movement led by The Master (Phillip Seymour Hoffman) and his wife (Amy Adams).

programme.title: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: The hit Oscar-winning drama which launched the careers of Matt Damon and Ben Affleck tells the tale of a headstrong, working-class genius who's failing the lessons of life, until he meets a relatable psychology professor (Robin Williams).

programme.title: House of Gucci
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of the family behind the Italian fashion empire. When Patrizia Reggiani marries into the Gucci family, her unbridled ambition begins to unravel the family legacy and triggers a spiral of betrayal, decadence, and murder.

programme.title: The Man in the Iron Mask
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio leads a phenomenal cast in this thrilling tale of majesty and Musketeers. When the excesses of France's arrogant King Louis XIV begin to threaten his subjects' very lives, the legendary Musketeers reunite to save their country!

programme.title: The Host
programme.desc: When an unseen enemy threatens mankind by taking over humans' bodies and erasing their minds, Melanie Stryder risks everything to protect the people she cares about most, proving that love can conquer all in a dangerous new world.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: In this visionary film, Will and Jake Grimm dazzle small towns with their imaginative folklore and elaborate illusions, only to discover many of the fantastic characters, and thrilling situations, found in their beloved fairy tales are real.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks
programme.desc: To his family and friends, Cody Banks is a typical teen. But Cody has a secret - he's actually part of an undercover teen CIA program and has 5 years of special training under his belt.

programme.title: Agent Cody Banks 2: Destination London
programme.desc: Traveling to London, Agent Cody Banks attends a prestigious school where he gets close to a man who is working with his arch villain Molay.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When high school senior Tripp discovers a gas-guzzling creature named Creech, the unlikely duo team up for a fun-filled, hilarious and heartfelt adventure in a real-life super-powered Monster Truck to reunite Creech with his family.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Space hero Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-canine buddy Barf (John Candy) are on a mission in their flying Winnebago to save Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) from the clutches of Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) in Mel Brooks' inspired sci-fi spoof!

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: John and Lisa have some cost-effective ideas in their Christmas kitchen this time.

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Mackerel is on the menu for Ming during his adventures in Norway. Known for his show “New Scandinavian Cooking,” chef Andreas Viestad introduces Ming to a farm apple Kir before they settle in to whip up two mouth-watering meals.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Chef Will Gilson and Ming make duck two ways. Will starts with Duck Breast and Hay-Roasted Carrots and Toasted Pistachios. Ming whips out his pressure cooker for Szechwan Duck Legs with his recipe for Fried Rice with Yukon Gold Potatoes.

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Oaxaca, Mexico - Chef Tony Bourdain explores the exotic and colorful indigenous zone of Mexicos Oaxaca region where he tastes toasted grasshoppers and other delicacies. His adventure ends with mariachi music and, of course, lots of tequila.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Los Angeles - CA, New York chef, Anthony Bourdain, descends into the culinary underbelly of his metropolitan nemesis, Los Angeles, where he experiences the trials of celebrity fame and the joys of West Coast cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Napa, CA - Marooned in San Francisco, Tony tastes local shellfish and durian ice cream before embarking on a pilgrimage to experience the genius of Thomas Keller, chef, and owner of The French Laundry.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The River Scamander and its banks are set alight by fireballs sent by the god Hephaestus. The river god spares Achilles, who immediately goes back on the rampage. The gods are shocked by his rage.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Great Greek Myths
programme.desc: Taking revenge against Prometheus, Zeus created the first woman - the beautiful Pandora. He gave her a manipulative and deceptive character and subjected Prometheus to terrible torture.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths

programme.title: Impossible Peace

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: In effort to keep peace, treaties were proposed to keep the aggressors of World War 1 under-armed. The ratio of military power was drastically in favor of the US and Great Britain. This might have successfully kept peace, if it was only given a chance.

programme.title: Impossible Peace
programme.desc: Exchange rates and floundering economies were not the only things influencing how and where people lived. The motor-car and other technological advances were transformative, though some clung tight to the past...

programme.title: Impossible Peace

programme.title: Impossible Peace

programme.title: Impossible Peace

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un policía pelea con un drogadicto que se cree Hulk. Los policías atrapan a un conductor que transporta drogas cuando se queda sin gasolina. Un sospechoso se enoja cuando le quitan los calcetines.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución de auto acaba porque un poste de concreto no se puede romper. Un hombre emocional solo quiere un beso de la policía. Hay una melé cuando una mujer se apodera del celular de su novio.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución acaba en inundación cuando el conductor choca con un hidrante. Un sospechoso de violencia doméstica no acepta la culpa. La policía halla mucho contrabando de una pareja armada.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La unidad K-9 responde cuando un pistolero sube a la azotea. Un intercambio de drogas va mal cuando el traficante intenta dejar su alijo. Un borracho destroza el auto de su vecino.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ladrón es perseguido hasta que los oficiales restringen el paso. Los policías refrescan a un bebe y buscan al sospechoso que lo dejo. Los oficiales encuentran a un hombre con heridas en el pecho.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso corre por el vecindario cuando su moto deja de servir. Se descubre a un hombre drogado en los arbustos. Los oficiales brindan paz a unos vecinos con problemas causados por un pitbull.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ciclista huye al ser detenido. Dos hermanos explican a los policías por que se alejaron de ellos. Un hombre golpea a su hermana por no cortar el césped.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso se refugia en un restaurante mientras es perseguido. Un conductor peligrosamente toma el volante de su abuela. Se captura a un sospechoso que huyó por violencia doméstica.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los oficiales hacen una maniobra PIT perfecta. Los policías intentan sacar a un hombre escondido en una tienda de donas. Mientras llueve, los oficiales detienen a un camión lleno de drogas.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso de robo es perseguido por oficiales. Después de dejar caer una bolsa de metanfetamina, un hombre jura no reconocerla. Un sospechoso de violencia doméstica dice que fue en defensa propia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso rebelde y sus perros igualmente impredecibles causan problemas. Dos sospechosos de robo son detenidos en la escena del crimen. Un adicto a la metanfetamina está al borde de recaer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre huye de los oficiales cuando encuentran entrada para los traficantes. Los policías sorprenden a un peatón y ven unos artículos extraños en su chaqueta. Una mujer asume la culpa de su amante.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ciclista cae cuando intenta huir. La policía sigue a un sospechose de coche robado que dice arreglar para su amigo. Un hombre se declara inocente cuando le ven una pipa de metanfetamina.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén se vuelve una enorme redada de drogas. Un hombre no puede explicar textos incriminatorios en su teléfono. Dos viajeros frecuentes causan problemas cuando se les encuentra en un área de drogas

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un pasajero se escapa de un auto robado que huye. Un oficial trabaja en una operación secreta de prostitución. Una mujer es atrapada con drogas luego de llamar a la policía por su marido peleón.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se produce una pelea cuando un auto se voltea en una persecución. Un hombre se queja de que un extraño trató de atarlo con un collar de metal. Una noche de póquer se convierte en un problema.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un conductor de grúa no le devuelve su auto a una mujer, por lo cual ella decide agredirlo con un bate. Un hombre asegura que la metanfetamina es medicinal y está dispuesto a defender su postura.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ciclista tiene una pelea sangrienta con varios oficiales. Una cuidadora de ancianos intenta desalojar a alguien de la casa de su paciente. Un papel de aluminio mete en problemas a un conductor.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución termina mal cuando un auto sin conductor choca con un apartamento. Un sospechoso fugaz no logra escaparse de la policía. En un patrullaje rutinario, la policía ve a un niño que se escapó de su casa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un policía juega al portero cuando atrapa a un ladrón corriendo hacia él. Víctimas de ladrones armados describen con detalle el crimen que se grabó. Oficiales hacen entrega de unos niños llorando a su madre.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía intenta desesperadamente de obtener la cooperación de un hombre desnudo. Después de una persecución, la policía descubre que el conductor es un niño. La policía tiene que lidiar con un problema de drogas y mentiras.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía toma medidas desesperadas contra un sospechoso agresivo. Agentes detienen a un hombre con drogas. La policía sospecha que un conductor nervioso que se rehúsa a ser revisado tiene marihuana en su auto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un retén se convierte en una carrera todo terreno por un barrio. La policía encuentra un sospechoso fugitivo escondido en el clóset de su pariente. Una pelea domestica estalla por papas fritas y salsa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Agentes tratan de descifrar si un conductor errático trae un auto robado. Alguien con un cuchillo se queja de sus vecinos que no dejan de fumar marihuana. Los policías encuentran a una persona suicida con una navaja en la garganta.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer transgénero en silla de ruedas le da su merecido a un agresor. Los oficiales encuentran una pareja semidesnuda mordiéndose. Un conductor imprudente se enfurece rápidamente.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía persigue en la carretera a un sospechoso que huye tras ser detenido. Un sistema de vigilancia en video ayuda a la policía a encontrar un agresor violento por apuñalamiento. La policía rastrea a un sujeto escondido en apartamento ajeno.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: Gotham Comedy Live

programme.title: The Half Hour

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: With a local business award up for grabs, Appa is feeling a little jumpy. Jung tries to get Shannon into cycling.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: A scholarly substitute teacher makes Chris' life a living hell by holding him to a higher standard than his classmates.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When the neighborhood DJ is arrested in the middle of a party, Chris steps in for him and proves to be a huge hit with the crowd.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Hoping to get more respect from his classmates and to stop being Caruso's punching bag, Chris signs up to be a hall monitor.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Chris accidentally shows up for school on a "snow day," he and Principal Edwards (Alexander) are stuck with each other until they can reach Chris' parents.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, over the moon, introduces the gang to her new boyfriend, Congressman Charles Hayward, but they soon begin to question his motives.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's engagement to Congressman Charles Hayward is put in jeopardy when a scandalous photo of her lands in thenewspaper. Haskell has an idea for a great new app, but needs an investor.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's big day arrives. Haskell and Nicki, now business partners, strike it rich.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: A comedy about three divorced men sharing an apartment across the hall from their female divorce attorney, who is also their landlord.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: On the day of Elka and Fred's wedding, Melanie, Victoria, and Joy wake up surrounded by passed-out frat boys, then piece together what happened the night before.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After her presumed-dead husband comes back into her life, Elka runs away with him, as Victoria exploits her bogus same-sex marriage to Joy for publicity.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: On a gay cruise, Victoria and Joy continue the charade that they are married, while Melanie runs into her sister and her girlfriend.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: When the dry cleaners misdeliver her favorite dress to a woman who then dies, Melanie crashes the funeral with Victoria, Joy and Elka to retrieve it undetected.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie, Victoria and Joy put their Midwestern neighbors on an L.A. weight-loss regimen, while Elka lies about her age to keep up with spontaneous thrill-seeker Roy.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria dates a hand model, Roy's mother dislikes Elka, Joy can't figure out the age of the guy she's seeing, and Melanie's boyfriend resembles Winnie-the-Pooh.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina faces the most difficult decision of her life when she must choose between her mom and her magic

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina learns she has to solve the family secret before she can use her Witches License.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: An embarrassing moment leaves Sabrina red in the face.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: The Tikis must team up with Team Mirage for their next race, and worse: Corto must fly in sync with Hannah or risk losing. Mouse tries to play coach and diplomat, but the two just can't get along.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: When Corto pays her a compliment, Debbie becomes her number one fan and even quits Team Starfish to join the Tikis. But when she realizes she's not welcome, Debbie vows to take revenge during their next race.

programme.title: Droners
programme.desc: Victoria's visiting mother replaces Mina with her as Team Siren's pilot and captain for a special race against the Tikis, following elite maelstrom rules.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman is making a movie about his life. He even tries to cast Sonic to play a lame version of Sonic. / Knuckles wants to win the village's annual Chili Dog Cook-Off. He sets out on a quest to find the perfect ingredients.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After a bad experience at Meh Burger, Amy decides to open her restaurant. / A second Knuckles from an alternate dimension becomes stranded in their world and causes trouble for Sonic and his friends.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic realizes he has seven minutes to return Amy's library book and ends up in a race against the clock. / After destroying Amy's couch, Sonic and Knuckles enter a “best friend” game show to win her a new one.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic gets cocky about his survival skills, Sticks and Amy challenge Sonic and Knuckles to the ultimate survival skills contest. / When Knuckles is made mayor for the day, he sends the village spiraling into chaos.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: After Sonic and the gang best Eggman by using his own technology against him, Eggman swears off technology for good. / When Orbot and Cubot discover a group of rejected Cubot prototypes hiding in the jungle, they seek the help of Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic refuses to let Mike, battle Eggman, the town turns against him for being insensitive/ When Knuckles replaces Comedy Chimp on his late night talk show, Comedy Chimp seeks the help of Eggman to steal back the show.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: When Sonic and the gang win an award for being role models, it comes with a price that keeps them from doing their jobs as heroes. / While the rest of the village is celebrating New Year's Eve, Eggman decides to slow down time.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: After over-using an invention called the "evil-scope"to predict and stop evil before it happens in all the Skylands, Spyro finds himself caught inside a swirling ball of the collected evil energy.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: The Skylanders work to help Crash Banidcoot find his way home after he somehow was transported from his world into theirs.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: The Doom Raiders and Kaos decide to attack Skylander Academy to find a mysterious and powerful spell book.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: To prove that he has a true superpower like the other Skylanders, Spyro puts himself in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: In order to finish her ninja training, Stealth Elf seeks out elusive ninja-genie-giant Ninjini.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: New cadet Cynder shows up to the Academy and bonds with Spyro, but Cynder's upbringing has her questioning whether she can truly be a hero like the Skylanders.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Over the annual “Thankstaking” holiday, Spyro and Elf accidentally get locked inside the Grand Library's relics room while everyone is gone for the long weekend.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus steals the Repository of the ghosts' corporeal bodies, but not before Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde nab one body to share between them. Then it's up to Pac, Cyli and Spiral to get the Repository back from the Netherworld...

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Sir Cumference tries to show that he is more than just an old scientist, he's still got it as a freedom fighter – but after some disastrous attempts, it soon becomes clear that he isn't quite the fighter he used to be.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld is becoming dangerously hot and its citizens mistakenly blame Sir C! Pac and Friends remain loyal to the elderly inventor and, together; they uncover a plot by Betrayus to terra-form PacWorld into a world just like the Netherworld.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: The annual Pacolympics approach and allow for Aunt Spheria to reignite a Pac-Pong rivalry with her former Pac-Pong rival and wanna-be suitor - Lord Betrayus. Let the games begin!

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: The new Misery Inc. catalogue is out, and Jimmy, thinking that the stuff is free, orders up every item. --- Jimmy and Beezy compete to snag the coveted hoof prints of Wrecken, their favourite soccer star.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy introduces a stressed-out Lucius to the foreign concept of a “vacation.” --- Heloise, Jimmy, and Beezy attempt to unite Cerbee with his true love, Jez's boohuahua "Jazmeen".

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After two racecar-driving fleas infest Jimmy’s and Beezy’s brains, the boys vie for title of fastest Miseryvillian. --- Jimmy tries Heloise’s ‘People Copier’ and ends up with an army of ‘Himmies’ who mimic his every move.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy suspects that his new neighbor is really the thing he fears most… a giant pickle. --- Jimmy and Beezy vie to join the Rodeo Clown's 'Cool Clown Club'.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: Jimmy turns the tables on Lucius Fools Day, the one day a year when Lucy gets to inflict more misery than usual. --- After accidentally lopping off Lucius’ horns, Jimmy must turn to one of Heloise's concoctions to make things right.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When the Heinous Museum is under attack, Heloise and Jimmy are pressed into security service. --- Lucius and the Weavils sign a peace treaty forcing Beezy to marry the unsightly Princess Weavil.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: After Beezy crushes the commander of the Gnomans, the tiny army of laborers makes him their new leader. --- When Heloise catches a mean case of the hiccups, the boys must (for once) take matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's mom asks her for a big favor. Briana takes an STI test after her night with Luis. Chelsea takes Aubree out for a mother-daughter day. Leah and Victoria visit her boyfriend in Costa Rica. Kailyn gets a surprising phone call.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn hears from her mom. Briana gets the results of her STI test. Jade graduates beauty school but family complications threaten her big day. Chelsea guides Aubree as she considers inviting Adam to the Father/Daughter dance. Leah's twins turn 10.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Briana confronts Luis about her STI test results. Jade is forced to support her family after they all lose their jobs. Kailyn and Jo go to counseling. Aubree reconsiders the Father/Daughter dance. Jeremy helps Leah.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: An explosive family brawl leaves Jade caught between Sean and her parents. DeVoin's family reappears in Briana and Nova's lives after being absent for years. Kailyn tries to connect with her sister.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade is caught between her mom and Sean, but a drug test could reveal the truth. After Ali has a bad fall, Leah is forced to balance her growing concerns and support her sister during childbirth. Kailyn has a shocking revelation about Javi.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Tensions erupt when Jade asks her parents to move out. After an x-ray, Leah grapples with the possibility that Ali's condition is progressing. Briana and family move into their new house just in time for a Thanksgiving blowup.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail celebrates Isaac's birthday while life-changing news weighs on her. Leah reveals secrets about her past. Briana gives Devoin an opportunity to step up. Chelsea tries to change Aubree's visitation agreement with Adam's parents.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: The new coronavirus threatens Leah's travel plans and brings up serious concerns for Ali's health. Briana holds a summit with Devoin and Luis to insist they take on financial responsibility. Kailyn opens up about her pregnancy.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: The threat of coronavirus intensifies as Chelsea travels to Los Angeles for work. Leah and the girls go into self-quarantine to protect Ali. Briana has a new, secret fling with the potential for major heartbreak.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: When coronavirus makes it unsafe for crews to film, the moms pick up the cameras to self-shoot. Despite quarantine, Leah's book release pushes her and Jeremy to confront their past. Jade is forced to close her salon during lockdown.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: As the country emerges from quarantine, Briana struggles with the decision to send Nova back to school. Chelsea and Cole try for another baby. Kail and Jo struggle with the decision to let Isaac have more say, and Leah's family has a COVID-19 scare.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kail gives birth to her 4th child. Chelsea worries about her health amid Cole's COVID-19 scare. Briana and Devoin get into a fight about finances. Leah's world is flipped upside down with all 3 kids at home. Jade calls Sean out for being unmotivated.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Tensions erupt between Jade & Sean at Kloie's birthday dinner. Leah attempts virtual learning with all three girls. Kailyn navigates a medical issue with Creed. Briana tries to put aside her anger with Devoin for Nova's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jade's frustrations force her to break up with Sean. Kailyn tries to co-parent through the stress of virtual learning. Chelsea gets busier as COVID-19 numbers spike in South Dakota. Leah clears the air with Corey about her struggles with addiction.
